# ElicitationCompleteNotificationParams.ElicitationId property

REQUIRED. The identifier of the elicitation that completed (spec §20.6). It MUST match the [`ElicitationId`](../ElicitRequestURLParams/ElicitationId.md) established in the original URL-mode `elicitation/create` request.

```csharp
public string ElicitationId { get; set; }
```
